nodes.context: International outlaw motorcycle club and principal support club for Hells Angels, involved in violent crimes and drug trafficking.
Now-defunct Canadian motorcycle club founded in late 1940s, patched over to Bacchus in 2015.
East Coast based motorcycle club that absorbed the Original Red Devils MC in 2015.
Major outlaw motorcycle club; Red Devils MC is its principal support club, performing violent tasks and protecting its interests.
Rival outlaw motorcycle club involved in disputes with Hells Angels and Red Devils.
Rival outlaw motorcycle club; a Red Devils member assaulted one of its members in 2020.
Motorcycle club involved in a gun battle with Red Devils and Hells Angels in 2022.
Motorcycle club involved in a gun battle with Red Devils and Hells Angels in 2022.

edges.context: Red Devils MC is the principal support club for Hells Angels, performing violent tasks and protecting their networks.
The Original Red Devils MC patched over to Bacchus in 2015.
A shooting attack on a Red Devils member in 2013 was speculated to be due to an ongoing dispute between Hells Angels and Bandidos.
A Red Devils member assaulted an Outlaws member in 2020, indicating rivalry.
Red Devils and Hells Angels were involved in a gun battle with Infamous Ryders in 2022.
Red Devils and Hells Angels were involved in a gun battle with La Familia in 2022.
Ongoing dispute between Hells Angels and Bandidos, as speculated in the 2013 shooting.
